hero.title: Aipify works for you.
hero.subtitle: Aipify helps organizations connect knowledge, workflows and business systems so teams can work smarter, leaders can see what matters and approved work can move faster.

modules.title: Core Modules
modules.subtitle: Core modules designed to connect your systems, support your teams, surface executive insight and strengthen business performance.

support.title: Aipify Support
support.description: Reduce response times and handle inquiries with confidence.
support.detail: Prepare high-quality replies, triage customer requests, and help teams respond thoughtfully with human oversight.

install.title: Aipify Install
install.description: Connect your existing systems and learn your operations.
install.detail: Connect your existing systems and let Aipify understand your workflows, knowledge and business structure.
install.highlight: Learns approved workflows with human validation

insights.title: Aipify Insights
insights.description: Surface trends, risks, and recommended actions.
insights.detail: Surface trends, risks, opportunities and recommended actions from your business data with executive-grade clarity.

commerce.title: Aipify Commerce
commerce.description: Optimize products, margins, and commerce performance.
commerce.detail: Optimize products, margins, supplier workflows and commerce performance with permission-based recommendations.

howItWorks.title: How Aipify Becomes Part of Your Organization
howItWorks.subtitle: A guided implementation flow designed for secure, scalable and measurable business value.

1.title: Connect your organization.
1.description: Connect your systems, knowledge sources, workflows and business tools. Aipify begins understanding how your organization already operates.
1.enterpriseNote: Secure integrations. Permission-based access. Human-controlled onboarding.

2.title: Aipify learns your operations.
2.description: Aipify analyzes approved workflows, support patterns, policies, knowledge, team structures and business rules to build operational understanding.
2.enterpriseNote: Validated knowledge. Audit-ready setup. No hidden automation.

3.title: Aipify supports your teams.
3.description: Aipify prepares replies, summaries, recommendations, reports and approved workflow actions across support, operations, insights and commerce.
3.enterpriseNote: Human oversight. Role-based permissions. Clear approval flows.

4.title: Leaders gain executive insight.
4.description: Aipify surfaces priorities, risks, opportunities, operational health and recommended next actions so leadership can make better decisions faster.
4.enterpriseNote: Executive-ready reporting. Governance visibility. Strategic clarity.

5.title: Scale with confidence.
5.description: Add modules, automations, permissions, integrations and business packs as your organization grows.
5.enterpriseNote: Multi-tenant architecture. Secure expansion. Instant upgrade access after payment.

cta.title: Ready to bring Aipify into your organization?
cta.subtitle: Deploy an intelligent business operating system for support, operations, governance, insights and growth.
cta.trustLine: Built for professional organizations. Governance-ready. Human oversight. Secure by design.
